[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_column_text]

Honeymoons offer the perfect excuse for newlyweds to get to each other well and spend some quality time before settling into domesticity. At ATW Travels, we have curated exclusive honeymoon packages for couples looking for a memorable first romantic vacation. Our inclusive vacation tours include accommodations at the best resorts, complimentary breakfast, sightseeing, activities, and airport transfers.

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Switzerland the Best Place for A Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

For millions of Indians who’ve grown up on their heroes romancing actresses against the snowy Alpine mountains, a honeymoon vacation to Switzerland is probably their best dream come true story ever. Switzerland is one of the most beautiful countries in Europe. The country offers plenty of romantic experiences, including dining at Jungfrau, taking a boat ride across Lake Lucerne, or taking a cable car to Grindelwald.

At ATW Travels, we offer Switzerland honeymoon packages that are affordable and yet cover all the important activities that this Alpine country is famous for. There’s something so enduring about watching cows grazing on the magnificent Alpine landscape or staying at one of the quaint hamlets in Geneva. Other romantic experiences include wine tasting, sampling delectable cheese, and fine chocolate, and taking the Golden Pass Train to enjoy gorgeous panoramic views of the Swiss Alps.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19474″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips To Remember When Planning a Romantic Swiss Vacation”][vc_column_text]

Switzerland, by far, is one of the most romantic locations for a honeymoon. Thanks to the wide range of activities available for tourists, you can visit the country all year through. But there are a few things you must remember before looking for Switzerland honeymoon packages.

  • You can get around the country with the Swiss rail pass, a single ticket pass covering most trains and buses. In fact, you can check your luggage at the beginning of the journey and get it at the end of the day, i.e., you can travel around without lugging your suitcase around.
  • Switzerland is a quiet place. This isn’t the place for nightlife enthusiasts. While most cafes and shops open at 6 am, they close as early as 7 pm. There are a few nightclubs in Lausanne, but the night scene is dull compared to cities like Madrid, Paris, or New York.
  • Everything is expensive in Switzerland, but worth the price. It is one of the most expensive countries in the world. You must keep track of finances or run the risk of going out of cash before you know. And that is why we suggest all-inclusive Switzerland honeymoon packages as they cover most activities.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219862813{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653551113351{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does a Switzerland Honeymoon Package Cost?”][vc_column_text]

A typical 5 nights and 6 days romantic Switzerland honeymoon tour package ranges anywhere from INR 1,00,000 to INR 2,00,000. It could even go up to INR 5,00,000, depending on the number of days you plan to stay, accommodation options, activities chosen, and add-on services provided.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Part of Switzerland Is Best for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Switzerland has a storybook landscape, offering a picturesque view of the Swiss Alps and beautiful sights. Below is a list of places that are a part of most Switzerland honeymoon packages:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19569″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Zermatt” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This place offers a panoramic view of the Alpine mountains. It is famous for its ski runs, climbing, hiking, and other outdoor activities. Honeymooning couples visit this car-free village to ride on horse-drawn carriages or experience fine dining at 3,883 metres above sea level.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Geneva” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The second most populous and artsy city, Geneva is known for its museums and the world-famous Chillon Castle. Lake Geneva is one of the most famous places in Switzerland and the largest Alpine lake in Europe.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Grindelwald” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This place offers a romantic retreat to couples looking to escape the crowd and noise of famous tourist places. If you’re an adventure lover, there are plenty of activities, including hiking and skiing.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Zurich” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This place is known for its opera house, churches, and botanical gardens aside from the scenic lanes, spectacular waterfront promenades, and beautiful snow-capped mountains.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Is the Best Time to Visit Switzerland for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

The weather in Switzerland is pleasant all through the year, making it ideal for different types of tourists. For instance, if you’re a ski enthusiast, winter is the best time to visit the country. But summer is equally beautiful, especially if you’re on a honeymoon. When you choose to go, there’s something for everyone in Switzerland.

The country experiences spring from April to June and fall from September to October. These are known to be some of the best months for honeymooners looking for a memorable vacation.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19570″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Choose ATW Travels as Your Travel Partner?”][vc_column_text]

As we earlier said, Switzerland is expensive and will put a dent in your pocket if you’re not careful. A lot of planning is involved in making your vacation memorable. At ATW Travels, we’ve partnered with some of the world’s largest trade partners to provide the best Switzerland honeymoon packages at the most affordable price. Our all-inclusive packages include all the wonders of the country and the activities you’ve always dreamed of.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are Some of The Best Lakes in Switzerland for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Switzerland has some of the most dazzling lakes in the world. One cannot visit Switzerland and miss the pristine lakes and clear waters all around the country. We’ve listed some for you below:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Lake Geneva” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Shared between France and Switzerland, Lake Geneva is situated on the northern side of the Alps for a serene experience.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Lake Thun” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Offering an enchanting view, this alpine lake is one of the most beautiful lakes in the country.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Lake Brienz” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Stunning turquoise waters and magnificent mountain sceneries are what make this lake one of the most breathtaking lakes in the country.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Lake Zurich” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is a ‘must visit’ lake and known for its crystal-clear blue waters with the alluring Alps in the backdrop.

Switzerland is full of beautiful lakes like Schwarzsee, Lake Maggiore, Riffelsee, Bachalpsee, Blausee, Oeschinensee, Lake Lugano, and so many more that makes for a perfect romantic background picture for your honeymoon.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are Some of The Best Places to Visit in Switzerland for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Being in a heavenly paradise-like Switzerland, where you are surrounded by gorgeousness wherever you go, it becomes difficult to choose what places to visit and what to miss. We have come up with some of the best places for you to stay in Switzerland on your honeymoon.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19571″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Interlaken” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This place is perfect for adventure seekers looking to indulge in paragliding, skiing, and snowboarding while travelling on one of the world’s best trains.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”The Matterhorn” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

One of the tallest points in the Alps situated between Switzerland and Italy, the Matterhorn offers a magnificent view of the alpine mountains.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”St. Moritz” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Dripping in luxury, St. Moritz is one of the most beautiful spots for honeymooners looking for romantic and charming locations.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Rhine Falls” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The largest plain waterfall in Europe, is one of the most impressive sights to behold with your sweetheart.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Are Some of The Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Switzerland for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Switzerland offers the best sightseeing opportunities and the best accommodation as well. Here are some of the resorts included in our Switzerland honeymoon packages.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Valbella Inn Resort” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

One of the top 4-star resorts in Switzerland, offers an open-air roof terrace, cold-water bath, an indoor pool, a wellness centre and much more to keep your honeymoon filled with love.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Alpen Resort Hotel” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

A 30-degree heated swimming pool and whirlpool make this luxurious hotel stand out amongst others. It is moderately expensive when compared to other resorts offering similar experiences.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Riffelalp Resort” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Offering stunning views of the Matterhorn through an exquisite outdoor swimming pool, it is one of the finest honeymoon ski resorts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Renaissance Lucerne Hotel” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The refined version of the century-old City Palais, the perfect mix of modernity and vintage gives off the old-school romance vibes.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

A kingdom of heaven, Switzerland vacations must be planned meticulously to get the best and most out of this beautiful country.

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646651678122{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

FAQs

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in Switzerland?
Switzerland is pleasant to visit all year round, but fall and spring are the best time to honeymoon in Switzerland because it is less crowded.
Which Is the Best Month to Visit Switzerland?
April to June and September to October are the best months to visit Switzerland for honeymooners as it doesn’t get too crowded.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Switzerland Trip?
Three to five days are more than sufficient to visit and explore this beautiful country's important attractions.
Is Switzerland Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Yes, Switzerland is safe for honeymoon couples looking to celebrate their love and spend quality time together in this beautiful country.
How Can I Reach Switzerland?
The best way to reach Switzerland is by taking a flight from any major city that will get you to Zurich, Basel, or Geneva - the three main international airports in Switzerland.
How Can I Travel in Switzerland?
Travelling by train is the most economical and easiest way to get around in Switzerland. The public transportation here is one of the best globally, making it relatively easy for locals and tourists alike to travel in Switzerland. You can also take the bus or rent a bike or a car to get around.
What Are the Visa Requirements for International Travellers Visiting Switzerland?
You’d need your passport with the validity exceeding the duration of the visit by 3 months; proof of hotel bookings, flight bookings, and a detailed plan of all the activities; Schengen travel visa insurance; proof of finances; bank statement of the last 6 months; proof of income tax returns; a cover letter explaining your visit to the country, and last but not least documents proving your civil status.
